metadata.description: MotionSpec — verified, reduced-motion-safe web motion plus a motion-accessibility audit, packaged as a Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: motionspec
plugins.description: Author + validate + compile reduced-motion-safe GSAP/CSS from a MotionSpec JSON, and audit any URL for WCAG 2.2.2/2.3.3 motion issues. Bundles the motionspec MCP server (motion_catalog, motion_validate, motion_compile, motion_audit, motion_stats).
